overall.description: A first-person walk through a rain-soaked cyberpunk city at night, featuring towering neon-lit skyscrapers, wet reflective streets, and moderate vehicle traffic. The player character walks along a sidewalk, crosses a large intersection with yellow grid markings, and approaches an NPC standing in the crosswalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk city sidewalk beneath neon skyscrapers

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet sidewalk beneath the glowing red softsys building

entered.detail: tall building with large red neon 'softsys' signage
illuminated advertising screen displaying purple and blue graphics
wet concrete pavement reflecting neon lights
tall metal pole with overhead lighting

segments.scene_description: Walking along a narrow cyberpunk sidewalk at night, with the iconic red neon softsys building dominating the view ahead. Digital billboards glow on the left while wet pavement reflects the vibrant neon lights. Sparse traffic moves along the street to the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: large wet intersection with yellow grid markings

events.description: turns right from sidewalk into the wide street intersection
black sedan drives past from left to right through the intersection

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide intersection while navigating through moderate traffic

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving through the intersection from left to right
yellow truck moving along the far side of the intersection

entered.detail: wet asphalt road with yellow grid pattern markings
long horizontal light fixture suspended over the street
tall dark building facade with minimal lighting

segments.scene_description: Turning into a wide open intersection, the scene expands to show the full breadth of the cyberpunk city street. The camera crosses the wet asphalt marked with yellow grids while vehicles pass through from various directions. Overhead fluorescent lights illuminate the crossing as the softsys building recedes to the left.

events.description: slows down and stops approaching the character standing in the crosswalk

agents.ego_description: approaching and stopping near an NPC standing in the middle of the crosswalk

notable_agents.action: character in dark clothing standing still in the crosswalk facing the camera

entered.detail: illuminated entrance to a building across the intersection

segments.scene_description: Continuing across the intersection, the camera approaches a character standing motionless in the crosswalk ahead. The wet pavement continues to reflect the surrounding neon lights as vehicles pass in the background. The scene ends with the camera stopping near the standing character.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a narrow, neon-lit sidewalk into a wide, bustling city intersection. It begins by walking past glowing digital billboards toward a dominating red neon softsys building, with the wet pavement reflecting the vibrant city lights. As the camera turns, the scene expands into a broad intersection where the softsys building recedes to the left and the view opens up to reveal vehicles passing across yellow grid markings under overhead fluorescent lights. The movement continues across the reflective asphalt, shifting focus from the sprawling cityscape to a single motionless character standing in the crosswalk. The shot finally concludes as the camera comes to a stop directly in front of the waiting figure.
